center.name: 霍比甘傑縣
center.summary: 霍比甘傑縣是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括鹩哥，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: religiosa at Satchari National Park, Habiganj District, Bangladesh | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | status2 = CITES_A2 | status2_system = CITES | status2_ref = | genus = Gracula | species = religiosa | authority = Linnaeus, 1758 | synonyms = Gracula indica (but see text) | range_map = Gracula.svg | range_map_caption = Distribution of various forms within the species complex }} The common hill myna (Gracula religiosa), sometimes spelled "mynah" and formerly simply known as the hill myna or myna bird, is a species of starling found in the hills of South and Southeast Asia
